name: Buddhist Nuoc Leo
recipeIngredient: Fresh hot red chili slices, to taste (optional)
1 tbsp Roasted peanuts [I use unsalted Planter's]
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the granulated sugar with the tuong and water until well combined.
2. Add fresh hot red chili slices if desired.
3. Sprinkle roasted peanuts on top.
